* 01 - 4 Colunas Vertical Simples
Local lcBar, lcLin, lcCol, lnCnt

lnCnt = 0
For I = 1 To (ThisForm.loObj.Qtd)
	lnCnt = lnCnt + 1
	If (lnCnt > 4)
		lnCnt = 1
	EndIf
	
	* Inicializando a Etiqueta
	If (lnCnt = 1)
		Set Printer To Name (ThisForm.loObj.Imp)
		Set Device To Printer

		??? Chr(02) + 'L' + Chr(13)
		??? 'H' + Alltrim(Str(ThisForm.loObj.Den)) + Chr(13)

* 02 - 4 Colunas Vertical Dupla
Local lcBar, lcLin, lcCol

For I = 1 To (ThisForm.loObj.Qtd + Mod(ThisForm.loObj.Qtd, 2)) Step 2
	Set Printer To Name (ThisForm.loObj.Imp)
	Set Device To Printer

	* Inicializando a Etiqueta
	??? Chr(02) + 'L' + Chr(13)
	??? 'H' + Alltrim(Str(ThisForm.loObj.Den)) + Chr(13)
	??? 'D11' + CHR(13)

	lcBar = ThisForm.loObj.Ini + Padl(fGerUniqueKey([ETIQ] + ThisForm.Dopes), 6, '0')

	* Etiqueta 1 

		* Superior
		lcLin = 018 + ThisForm.loObj.Hor
		lcCol = 030 + ThisForm... [TRUNCADO]

* 03 - 2 Colunas Horizontal
Local lcBar, lcLin, lcCol

For I = 1 To ThisForm.loObj.Qtd
	Set Printer To Name (ThisForm.loObj.Imp)
	Set Device To Printer

	lcBar = ThisForm.loObj.Ini + Padl(fGerUniqueKey([ETIQ] + ThisForm.Dopes), 6, '0')

	* Inicializando a Etiqueta
	??? Chr(02) + 'L' + Chr(13)
	??? 'H' + Alltrim(Str(ThisForm.loObj.Den)) + Chr(13)
	??? 'D11' + CHR(13)

	* Etiqueta da Esquerda
	lcLin = 030 + ThisForm.loObj.Hor
	lcCol = 037 + ThisForm.loObj.Ver
	??? '1e63040' + Padl(lcLin, 4, '0') +... [TRUNCADO]

Local Array laPrinter1(1)
Local lnDen, llOks, lcImp, lnTip

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdOpe', 'LocalOpe', 'Dopes', .Dopes, 'NDopes')

	.loObj.Qtd = Int(.getQtde.Value)
	.loObj.Den = Int(.spnDensidade.Value)
	.loObj.Hor = Int(.spnHorizontal.Value)
	.loObj.Ver = Int(.spnVertical.Value)
	.loObj.Imp = .optImpressora.Buttons(.optImpressora.Value).Tag
	.loObj.Tip = Padl(.cmbTipos.ListIndex, 2, [0])
	.loObj.Ini = Padl(LocalOpe.NDopes, 4, [0])
EndWith

Lparameters pDop

ThisForm.cntSombra.lblSombra.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
ThisForm.cntSombra.lblTitulo.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
